markdown:
# Tavern Brawler

You gain the following benefits.

## Enhanced Unarmed Strike

When you hit with your [[unarmed_strike Strike]] and deal damage, you can deal Bludgeoning damage equal to 1d4 plus your Strength modifier instead of the normal damage of an [[unarmed_strike Strike]].

## Damage Rerolls

Whenever you roll a damage die for your [[unarmed_strike Strike]], you can reroll the die if it rolls a 1, and you must use the new roll.

## Improvised Weaponry

You have proficiency with improvised weapons.

## Push

When you hit a creature with an [[unarmed_strike Strike]] as part of the [[attack]] action on your turn, you can deal damage to the target and also push it 5 feet away from you. You can use this benefit only once per turn.
